_meta.why: Declares which Open WebUI capabilities are enabled for this model. Controls what UI elements appear and what pipeline features activate.

model_native.why_safe_ceiling: NIM Free Tier shared infra produces extreme latency and occasional timeouts above 64K tokens. 65536 is the enforced operational ceiling, not a model limit.

image_input.reason: Nemotron Ultra is a text-only model. Enabling would surface confusing UI without function.

image_generation.reason: Out of scope for reasoning runtime.

arena_mode.reason: Arena mode wastes 2× RPM budget for A/B comparison. Not viable on 32 RPM Free Tier.
